_comment: Copy this file to members.json and fill in your club's data. members.json is gitignored and never committed.

_template_vars.display_name: Member's display name (set in this file)
_template_vars.strava_url: Link to the Strava activity or athlete profile

members.message: 🏃 {display_name} just crushed it! *{activity_name}* — **{distance} mi** in **{time}** at {pace} /mi 🔥
💨 {display_name} is out here making it look easy! *{activity_name}* — {distance} mi in {time}
